main.description: Exchange a delegation token for a space credential. Called on the space authority, with the delegation token as the request's authorization token. The resulting space credential reads repos across the space. Requires a delegation token, plus a client attestation when the space gates on app identity.

clientAttestation.description: Optional client attestation JWT establishing the app's identity. Required only when the space gates on app identity.

errors.name: UserNotAuthorized
errors.description: Refused on the basis of the requesting user.

errors.name: AppNotAuthorized
errors.description: Refused on the basis of the requesting app.

errors.name: NotAuthorized
errors.description: Refused for a reason not attributable to a single axis.
